# frontend-review-ci

> Use when CI is slow (>10 min), flaky, or the user asks to optimize GitHub Actions for a frontend project. Analyzes `gh run list` history, identifies bottleneck steps, proposes sharding / cache / concurrency improvements. Runs `scripts/audit-ci.sh`.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/frontend/review-ci
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/frontend/review-ci
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add mizchi/skills --skill frontend-review-ci
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/frontend/review-ci ~/.claude/skills/frontend-review-ci
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
